name: Test perform
about: 'Task for anything related to testing: manual, automated, performance and so
  one.'
title: "[Test]"
labels: testing
assignees: ''

---

### 📝 Description
Provide a brief overview of the testing goals and context.
- **Test Type:** [Manual / Automotive / Performance]
- **Environment:** [e.g., Staging, HW Bench, HIL Setup]
- **Version/Build:** [e.g., v1.2.3-rc1 or Commit SHA]
- **Reference Docs:** [Link to Requirements/Confluence]

---

### 🛠 Test Scope
*Select and fill the relevant section for this task:*

#### **Manual Testing**
- [ ] UI/UX Verification
- [ ] Regression of core features
- [ ] Specific cases: [Describe here]

#### **Performance Testing**
- [ ] **Metrics:** [e.g., Latency, Throughput, Resource usage]
- [ ] **Load:** [e.g., 500 requests/sec, 5h soak test]
- [ ] **Thresholds:** [e.g., Max CPU 80%, RAM < 2GB]

---

### 📈 Results & Artifacts
- **Test Status:** ⚪️ NOT STARTED / 🔵 IN PROGRESS / 🟢 PASSED / 🔴 FAILED
- **Report Link:** [Link to Allure/TestRail/PDF]
- **Logs:** [Attach .log or .pcap files]
- **Evidence:** [Screenshots/Recordings]

---

### 🐞 Linked Bugs
- # (Issue Number) - [Brief Bug Title]
